subcodes.first_line: Thy call hath been heard and Thy letter witnessed. Verily, thy Lord is He Who transformeth hardship into comfort and difficulty into ease. He, verily [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندایت شنیده شد و کتابت مشاهده گشت ان ربک مبدل الشده بالرخاء و العسر بالیسر انه
subcodes.subjects: @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
